summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of the 4 reported bugs and 1 P0 new feature on BookBridge India. All 4 user-reported bugs are FIXED in the preview environment. Backend: 46/47 pytest cases pass (98%); the single failure is an unrelated edge case (GET /api/books/{invalid-uuid} returns 500 vs 404 because Supabase rejects the malformed UUID). Frontend: all critical flows verified via Playwright — registration end-to-end, clean login UI, no Emergent watermark, Reviews page file-upload composer, comment/like/text-only regressions.

minor.issue: Returns 500 instead of 404 when book_id is not a valid UUID (Supabase raises APIError before the empty-result path executes). Cosmetic; wrap sb.table lookup in try/except and raise HTTPException(404).

action_items: (Optional / minor) Wrap invalid UUID lookups in GET /api/books/{id} so they surface as 404 instead of 500.
The four reported P0 bugs are resolved on the preview environment; the user must now redeploy Vercel (which is blocked by the separate `uv pip install` build issue tracked outside this test round).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 879 lines — approaching the 700-line split threshold; consider splitting into routers/{auth,books,cart,orders,posts,chat,admin}.py for maintainability.
GET /api/books/{id} lookup uses raw string in sb.table().eq('id', book_id) without a UUID guard, causing 500 on malformed IDs (see minor issue above).

seed_all() short-circuits if any user exists — if a demo admin was ever seeded with an old password, changing ADMIN_PASSWORD in .env will NOT update it. Consider making seed idempotent (upsert with password refresh) — this matches auth playbook guidance.

CORS defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True (backend/.env) — browsers reject credentialed requests when Origin is '*'. Not currently broken because frontend uses Bearer tokens (no cookies), but should be explicit origins if cookie auth is ever added.

Emergent watermark cleanly removed (no posthog script, no badge, no `emergent.sh` link, no 'Made with Emergent' string in DOM). One benign source-code comment mentioning 'Emergent preview' remains in /app/frontend/src/lib/api.js — harmless (never rendered to DOM).
test_credentials: admin@bookbridge.in / Admin@123, aditi@demo.in / demo123 (both verified working)
seed_data_creation: Test data prefixed with TEST_ was created via the API (books, posts, comments, orders). Playwright registered ephemeral users like test_reg_<rand>@bookbridge.in (harmless).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 P0 bugs (registration failing, demo accounts on login, Emergent watermark, image-URL-only in reviews) are verified FIXED in preview. Full pytest suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_bookbridge_api.py (47 tests) + /app/backend/tests/test_post_image_upload.py (2 tests). Playwright verified: (1) registration → auto-login round trip works, (2) /login has no demo section, (3) DOM has no emergent watermark/posthog, (4) Reviews composer uses hidden file input + preview + Remove button (no URL text box), and posts render uploaded images in the feed. Vercel production deploy is a separate `uv pip install` issue outside this test scope.
rca of the issue: The 4 reported bugs were already fixed at code level: Auth.jsx has no demo section, index.html has no emergent badge, Reviews.jsx uses hidden <input type=file> + FileReader + canvas resize + POST /api/posts with data URL, and /api/auth/register works end to end. Backend upload_data_url_to_storage() correctly detects base64 data URLs and pushes them to Supabase Storage bucket 'images', returning a public URL. Testing confirmed all four scenarios work against REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
